backingDescription: bC3M is a tracker certificate that tracks the Amundi ETF GOVIES 0-6 Months EUROMTS Investment Grade UCITS ETF. The underlying ETF seeks to replicate the FTSE Eurozone Government Bill 0-6 Month Capped Index, which measures short-term sovereign bonds of certain Eurozone states with 0–6 month maturity.
custodian: Alpaca Securities LLC; InCore Bank AG; Maerki Baumann & Co. AG

_meta.notes: No explicit bC3M collateral ratio, reserve breakdown, reserve audit, attestation, redemption settlement asset, or proof-of-reserves mechanism was confirmed from accessible official sources. Absence of evidence is represented as null rather than false.
